title: Whisper from-field implicitly safe but not commented: looks like a missing check
description: ws.rs handles Whisper by constructing WhisperDeliver { from: pub_id.0.clone(), payload } — relay fills in the authenticated sender, so spoofing is impossible. But there is no comment explaining this. CLAUDE.md §4 says 'the relay must verify envelope.from == authenticated_pub_id on every Send', and a reviewer applying that rule to the Whisper branch would expect to see an explicit check and find none. What would make it clear: a one-line comment: '// from is set by relay from authenticated pub_id — client-supplied from field does not exist in Whisper'
